memoryArtifacts.headline: Bohemond II (1107/1108-February 1130)
memoryArtifacts.description: Bohemond II (1107/1108-February 1130) was Prince of Taranto from 1111 to 1128 and Prince of Antioch from 1111/1119 to 1130. He was the son of Bohemond I, who in 1108 was forced to submit to the author …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch於1107年出生在安賀亞時，他的父親Bohemond I of Apulia Prince of Antioch49歲，母親Constance de France princesse de France, consort of Antioch29歲。他於1126年與Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1131年2月在亞美尼亞享年24歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch was born in 1107, in Antioch, his father, Bohemond I of Apulia Prince of Antioch, was 49 and his mother, Constance de France princesse de France, consort of Antioch, was 29. He married Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch in 1126. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in February 1131, in Armenia, at the age of 24.

fr.Ciano d'Enza, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Roma: Ciano d'Enza, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Romagna, Italie
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch est né en 1107, à Antioche, son père, Bohemond I of Apulia Prince of Antioch, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Constance de France princesse de France, consort of Antioch, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch en 1126. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en février 1131, à Arménie, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.Ciano d'Enza, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Roma: Ciano d'Enza, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Romagna, Italien
de.lifeSummary: Als Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch 1107 in Antiochia geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bohemond I of Apulia Prince of Antioch 49 und seine Mutter Constance de France princesse de France, consort of Antioch 29. Er hat 1126 Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb im Februar 1131 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Armenien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch è nato il nel 1107 nel Antiochia, il suo padre, Bohemond I of Apulia Prince of Antioch, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Constance de France princesse de France, consort of Antioch, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch nel 1126. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel febbraio 1131, nel Armenia, all'età di 24 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch(이)가 1107년 앤티오치아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bohemond I of Apulia Prince of Antioch(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de France princesse de France, consort of Antioch(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1126년 Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1131년 2월 아르메니아에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch nasceu em 1107, em Antioquia, seu pai, Bohemond I of Apulia Prince of Antioch, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Constance de France princesse de France, consort of Antioch, tinha 29 anos. ru.Ciano d'Enza, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Roma: сяно д'енза, регио эмеля, эмеля-ромагна, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bohemond II de Hauteville Prince of Antioch родился в 1107 г. в местности Антиохия, его отцу по имени Bohemond I of Apulia Prince of Antioch было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance de France princesse de France, consort of Antioch, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch в 1126 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер февраль 1131 г. в местности Армения в возрасте 24 лет.

Se casó con Alice of Jerusalem Princess of Antioch en 1126. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en febrero de 1131, en Armenia, a la edad de 24 años.
